name: Real-Time Chat Application
description: Full-stack chat platform with multiple chatrooms, built using React, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Sequelize, WebSockets, and JWT authentication.

name: Stock Market Data API
description: Lightweight Node.js API that retrieves and formats stock market data for a given symbol, focusing on clean routing and modular design.

name: SQLite Clone
description: A minimal SQLite-style database engine written in C, implementing B-tree indexing and supporting SELECT and INSERT operations using low-level file I/O.

name: Redis Clone
description: A lightweight Redis-inspired in‑memory key–value store implemented in C, featuring basic command parsing, data structures, and a minimal server loop to explore low‑level systems programming.

name: Mared Construcciones
description: Full-stack web app for a construction company. React 19 + Vite frontend with a public marketing site and an admin area for managing services, customers, and quotes.

name: HTTP Server (Raw Sockets)
description: Custom HTTP server built in C using raw TCP sockets. Parses HTTP headers, handles credential submission, stores data using system calls, and returns raw HTML responses.

name: Toy Neural Network Engine
description: Prototype neural network implemented in C using nested neuron-layer-network structs, Xavier initialization, and groundwork for training and backpropagation.

name: Blockchain JS
description: Lightweight blockchain implementation in JavaScript demonstrating core concepts such as blocks, hashing, proof-of-work, and chain validation.

name: Tetris Console Game
description: Console-based Tetris clone built in C++ to strengthen problem-solving skills, grid management, and game loop logic.

name: Snake Console Game
description: Classic Snake game implemented in C++ to reinforce understanding of arrays, movement logic, collision detection, and state updates.

name: Blackjack Console Game
description: Fully functional Blackjack game written in C++ to practice syntax, vectors, control flow, and basic object-oriented programming.
